title: Gap ledger
purpose: Record current unresolved, externally trusted, bounded-seed-only, and release-blocking gaps as explicit machine-readable public-review obligations.

gapStatusLegend.blocked-release-gap: Activation-blocking gap tied to an active release blocker.
gapStatusLegend.known-unresolved: Known unresolved technical or mathematical issue requiring additional representation or discharge.
gapStatusLegend.represented-not-discharged: A surface exists, but the ledger does not yet claim the corresponding obligation is fully discharged.
gapStatusLegend.explicit-external-trust: A deliberately external assumption in the trust base.
gapStatusLegend.bounded-seed-only: Evidence is currently bounded or seed-level and does not yet establish the unrestricted statement.
gapStatusLegend.reproducibility-hardening-gap: Reproducibility mechanism exists, but stronger deterministic or digest-pinned evidence remains future work.

severityLegend.activation-blocking: Must be resolved before public theorem emission can be enabled.
severityLegend.trust-base: Part of the current explicit external trust base.
severityLegend.hardening: Required for stronger audit confidence but not presented as clearing final theorem blockers.
severityLegend.documentation-boundary: Clarifies public report/status language and historical/successor boundaries.

gaps.statement: The repository still blocks unrestricted final soundness: bounded seed checks, release-ladder evidence, and current proof-obligation evidence do not yet discharge the unrestricted final soundness gate.
gaps.closeCondition: Represent and check unrestricted final soundness as a non-seed, non-bounded release obligation; remove Release.UnrestrictedFinalSoundness only through an accepted release-ladder transition.

gaps.statement: External review acceptance remains an active release blocker and has not been represented as cleared by any current checker.
gaps.closeCondition: Record accepted external review evidence as an explicit release transition; remove ExternalReview.Acceptance only through the release ladder.

gaps.statement: NAND and locked-NAND SAT small-model checks are bounded seed evidence and do not yet constitute the full uniform theorem for all SAT input sizes.
gaps.closeCondition: Replace or lift bounded seed checks with a uniform proof object covering every SAT input size under polynomial-time generation.

gaps.statement: The finite-to-unbounded family audit is now represented as a dedicated checker, but it does not yet prove that every finite certificate schema uniformly covers all SAT input sizes in polynomial time.
gaps.closeCondition: Replace this represented-but-not-discharged audit with an accepted checker proving that the certificate schema is uniform and polynomial for all SAT sizes, not just represented by finite or seed evidence.

gaps.statement: The no-hidden-oracle audit is a source-surface seed scanner and does not yet prove semantic absence of every possible oracle-shaped or exact-minimization shortcut.
gaps.closeCondition: Expand the no-hidden-oracle audit from source pattern scanning to stronger semantic/AST/import/macro expansion coverage, or represent why the current restricted language is complete.

gaps.statement: The checker stack currently trusts the JavaScript runtime semantics for the checked fragment, even though independent verifier surfaces reduce but do not eliminate this trust-base item.
gaps.closeCondition: Reduce runtime trust by expanding independent runtime/verifier replay, formalizing the checked fragment, or replacing implicit runtime assumptions with bounded validated semantics.

gaps.statement: Artifact identity still relies on SHA256 collision resistance and Git object integrity as explicit external assumptions.
gaps.closeCondition: Keep assumptions explicit, add independent digest implementations, and separate hash identity from semantic equality wherever possible.

gaps.statement: Core NAND semantics and complexity implications are executable and ledgered, but no generated Lean/Coq or equivalent formal proof skeleton is yet represented for the core semantics.
gaps.closeCondition: Generate formal statement skeletons or proof exports for core semantics and complexity ledgers, then bind them to checker outputs.

gaps.statement: Independent verifier coverage is currently partial: it checks core artifacts and policy surfaces, but does not yet independently replay the full proof-certificate stack.
gaps.closeCondition: Expand independent verifiers to replay more checker semantics and artifact ledgers without importing JavaScript logic.

gaps.statement: The container environment pins Node major version and Debian distribution, but it is not yet pinned to an immutable base-image digest.
gaps.closeCondition: Pin the base image by digest and record the digest in the container environment manifest and regeneration ledger.

gaps.statement: The determinism audit provides a replay harness and CI smoke comparison, but it does not yet prove full cross-platform byte-for-byte determinism for every generated artifact.
gaps.closeCondition: Run and record full verifier determinism across pinned container and multi-platform environments, including stable generated artifact normalization where byte identity is not expected.

gaps.statement: Historical sealed report artifacts still contain direct theorem-emission wording; successor public-review materials currently fence that language but do not yet fully supersede every historical public surface.
gaps.closeCondition: Publish successor canonical report and public surface payloads that consistently consume the current gate state and clearly separate historical theorem-emission artifacts from current public-review status.
